raw_consumer_statement: My account at XXXX XXXX had a XXXX balance. Then on my statement, there was a charge of {$1100.00} On the next statement, a fee of {$29.00}. was charged for LATE FEE. Now my balance is {$1200.00}. The next statement. Two months later, my balance is XXXX with a credit that says XXXX and purchases of {$2400.00} giving me a new balance of {$1700.00}. I have called so many times, I could not even begin to remember the dates. I filed a fraud complaint, and they always came back saying I owed the money. This has been going on for 4 months. I am afraid that they will report this to the credit bureaus. I had an excellent payment record until this. I am a senior citizen and feel that I am being taken advantage of.
